name: appendix
description: Evaluate and improve appendix slides — backup evidence, definitions, assumption pages, and reference exhibits
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 with appendix slides that are structured, legible, and clearly subordinate but still evidence-complete

prompts.text: Build an appendix slide listing the key assumptions behind a revenue forecast with categories, values, and notes
Build an appendix slide defining eight KPI terms used in the main deck with short business definitions
Build an appendix slide summarizing primary data sources, date ranges, and validation status for an operations review
Build an appendix slide with backup regional financial detail not shown in the main deck
Build an appendix slide with detailed risk descriptions, owner names, and mitigation actions
Build an appendix slide describing the benchmarking methodology and sample used for a market study
Build an appendix slide listing ten reference customers by segment, geography, and use case
Build an appendix slide breaking synergy estimates into workstreams, timing, and confidence levels
Build an appendix slide with detailed milestone dates and dependency notes behind the transformation roadmap
Build an appendix glossary slide for an AI strategy deck with acronym and term definitions
